summary: Table mode emits a HandResult event for every completed hand; the stats subsystem consumes it to update table-scope counters (hands played, VPIP, PFR, 3-bet%, WTSD, W$SD, BB/100, GTO-deviation).

hand_result_event.name: stats.recordHandResult
hand_result_event.HandResult_shape: { hand_id: string, mode: 'table', timestamp: number, hero_position: string, hero_voluntarily_put_money_in_pot: boolean, hero_preflop_raised: boolean, hero_3bet: boolean, hero_went_to_showdown: boolean, hero_won_at_showdown: boolean | null, pot_size_chips: number, hero_pnl_bb: number, gto_deviations: { street: string, action: string, deviation_score: number, reason?: string }[] }
hand_result_event.purpose: Table calls this on every hand resolution (showdown, fold-out, or hero-folds-preflop). Stats increments hands_played, updates VPIP/PFR/3bet%/WTSD/W$SD using the boolean fields, accumulates BB/100 from hero_pnl_bb, and aggregates gto_deviations into the GTO-deviation score.

data_passed_not_logic: Table passes a structured result; stats does not call back. Booleans are pre-computed by table (it knows the hand's flow); stats just aggregates.

section-5_owns: constructing HandResult, deriving the booleans correctly per NLHE definitions

test_seam: Unit test: emit a series of synthetic HandResult records covering each boolean combination; assert stats counters update per the canonical formulas (e.g., VPIP = hands_with_vpip / hands_played).
